# Vježba 13 — Cjevovodi {.unnumbered}

## Fizikalni uvod: Reynoldsov broj i dinamika cjevovoda

Strujanje realnog fluida u zatvorenim kanalima i cijevima određeno je odnosom sila inercije i sila viskoznosti, što kvantificiramo pomoću bezdimenzijskog **Reynoldsovog broja ($Re$)**:
$$Re = \frac{\rho v d}{\mu} = \frac{v d}{\nu}$$

Ovisno o vrijednosti $Re$, strujanje poprima bitno različite karakteristike:
*   **Laminarno strujanje ($Re < 2320$):** Fluid se giba u pravilnim, paralelnim slojevima bez međusobnog miješanja. Profil brzine u poprečnom presjeku je **parabola**, a gubici energije su linearno proporcionalni brzini.
*   **Prijelazno područje ($2320 < Re < 4000$):** Nestabilan režim strujanja kod kojeg dolazi do povremenih pojava turbulencije.
*   **Turbulentno strujanje ($Re > 4000$):** Kaotično i nepravilno gibanje s izraženim vrtloženjem. Profil brzine postaje **plosnat** zbog intenzivnog miješanja impulsa čestica, a gubici energije ovise o kvadratu brzine.

### Otpori i hidrauličke mreže

Ukupni pad tlaka u cjevovodu rezultat je **linijskih otpora** (trenje duž stijenki cijevi) i **lokalnih otpora** (promjene smjera strujanja, ventili, suženja). Kod turbulentnog strujanja, intenzitet trenja izrazito ovisi o **relativnoj hrapavosti ($\epsilon/D$)** unutrašnje stijenke cijevi.

U inženjerskoj praksi često rješavamo složene sustave cjevovoda:
1.  **Serijsko spajanje:** Volumenski protok $Q$ je isti kroz sve dionice, dok su ukupni gubici energije zbroj gubitaka na svakoj pojedinačnoj dionici.
2.  **Paralelno spajanje:** Pad tlaka (gubitak energije) je isti za sve paralelne grane, dok se ukupni protok raspodjeljuje na grane ovisno o njihovom hidrauličkom otporu.

Ispravno poznavanje ovih zakona nužno je za projektiranje efikasnih vodoopskrbnih, klimatizacijskih i industrijskih sustava te za pravilan odabir radne točke crpki.

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Interaktivni Moodyjev dijagram

Moodyjev dijagram je ključni alat u mehanici fluida za određivanje koeficijenta trenja $\lambda$. Ovisi o Reynoldsovom broju ($Re$) i relativnoj hrapavosti cijevi ($k/D$).

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Moodyjev Dijagram -->
<div id="v13-moody-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #d9e7f7;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 28px 64px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
            line-height: 1.06;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0f2fe, #ede9fe);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #1e293b;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #172554 0%, #0f172a 60%, #020617 100%);
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(148,163,184,0.08);
        }
        #v13-moody-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-legend,
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-reading,
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-controls,
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-metric,
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-legend {
            padding: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            color: #334155;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-legend-title,
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-reading-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-legend-title {
            color: #475569;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-legend-row + .m13-legend-row {
            margin-top: 8px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-reading {
            padding: 18px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a, #172554);
            border-color: rgba(148,163,184,0.26);
            color: #e2e8f0;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-reading-kicker {
            color: #94a3b8;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-lambda {
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.6vw, 1.9rem);
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #fbbf24;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-controls,
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-control + .m13-control {
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #475569;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-metric strong,
        #v13-re-card,
        #v13-rule-card,
        #v13-kd-card {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #v13-moody-widget .m13-explainer {
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #v13-moody-widget .m13-head,
            #v13-moody-widget .m13-summary,
            #v13-moody-widget .m13-lower,
            #v13-moody-widget .m13-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #v13-moody-widget .m13-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="m13-shell">
        <div class="m13-head">
            <div>
                <div class="m13-kicker">Moodyjev dijagram</div>
                <h4 class="m13-title">Prvo odredi gdje si po Reynoldsovom broju, a tek onda čitaj kako hrapavost pomiče otpor trenja</h4>
                <p class="m13-sub">Završni polish ovdje nije dirao fiziku nego ritam čitanja: graf je sada čist bez prekrivanja, a legenda i trenutno očitanje preseljeni su u sažetak ispod scene.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="m13-chip">Re + k/D -> λ</div>
        </div>

        <div class="m13-note"><strong>Kako čitati Moodyja:</strong> Najprije lociraš <strong>Re</strong> po vodoravnoj osi. Zatim provjeriš jesi li u laminarnom, prijelaznom ili turbulentnom području. Tek kad si u turbulentnom području ima smisla pratiti krivulju za određeni <strong>k/D</strong> i očitati odgovarajući <strong>λ</strong>.</div>

        <div class="m13-stage">
            <div class="m13-scene">
                <canvas id="v13-moody-canvas" width="960" height="560"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="m13-summary">
                <div class="m13-legend">
                    <div class="m13-legend-title">Legenda</div>
                    <div class="m13-legend-row"><span style="color:#fbbf24; font-weight:700;">●</span> Trenutna radna točka</div>
                    <div class="m13-legend-row"><span style="color:#38bdf8; font-weight:700;">━</span> Glatka cijev / mali k/D</div>
                    <div class="m13-legend-row"><span style="color:#f97316; font-weight:700;">━</span> Veća hrapavost</div>
                    <div class="m13-legend-row"><span style="display:inline-block; width:12px; height:10px; background:rgba(34,197,94,0.18); border-radius:3px;"></span> Laminarno</div>
                    <div class="m13-legend-row"><span style="display:inline-block; width:12px; height:10px; background:rgba(245,158,11,0.18); border-radius:3px;"></span> Prijelaz</div>
                </div>
                <div class="m13-reading">
                    <div class="m13-reading-kicker">Trenutno očitanje</div>
                    <div class="m13-lambda">λ = <span id="v13-res-lambda">---</span></div>
                    <div>Režim: <b id="v13-res-regime">---</b></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="m13-lower">
            <div class="m13-controls">
                <div class="m13-control">
                    <label>Reynolds (log Re): <span id="v13-v-re" style="color:#2563eb;">5.0</span></label>
                    <input type="range" id="v13-re-slider" min="3" max="8" step="0.01" value="5">
                </div>
                <div class="m13-control">
                    <label>Relativna hrapavost k/D: <span id="v13-v-kd" style="color:#2563eb;">0.0010</span></label>
                    <input type="range" id="v13-kd-slider" min="-6" max="-1.3" step="0.1" value="-3">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div>
                <div class="m13-metrics">
                    <div class="m13-metric"><small>Re</small><strong id="v13-re-card">0</strong></div>
                    <div class="m13-metric"><small>Pravilo za λ</small><strong id="v13-rule-card">---</strong></div>
                    <div class="m13-metric"><small>k/D</small><strong id="v13-kd-card">0</strong></div>
                </div>
                <div class="m13-explainer" style="margin-top:14px;"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="v13-explainer"></span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v13-moody-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const reS = document.getElementById('v13-re-slider');
    const kdS = document.getElementById('v13-kd-slider');
    const roughnessCurves = [0, 1e-5, 5e-5, 1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 5e-3, 1e-2];
    const curveColors = ['#38bdf8', '#60a5fa', '#818cf8', '#a78bfa', '#f472b6', '#fb7185', '#f97316', '#facc15'];
    const plot = { left: 92, right: canvas.width - 74, top: 46, bottom: canvas.height - 82 };

    function solveLambda(re, kd) {
        if (re <= 0) return 0.02;
        if (re < 2320) return 64 / re;
        const inv = -1.8 * Math.log10(Math.pow(Math.max(kd, 1e-10) / 3.7, 1.11) + 6.9 / re);
        return 1 / (inv * inv);
    }

    function classifyRegime(re) {
        if (re < 2320) return { label: 'laminarno', rule: '64/Re', color: '#4ade80' };
        if (re < 4000) return { label: 'prijelazno', rule: 'nestabilno', color: '#f59e0b' };
        return { label: 'turbulentno', rule: 'Haaland/Colebrook', color: '#f87171' };
    }

    function xFromRe(re) {
        return plot.left + ((Math.log10(re) - 3) / 5) * (plot.right - plot.left);
    }

    function yFromLambda(lambda) {
        const logMin = Math.log10(0.008);
        const logMax = Math.log10(0.12);
        return plot.top + ((logMax - Math.log10(lambda)) / (logMax - logMin)) * (plot.bottom - plot.top);
    }

    function formatKd(kd) {
        if (kd < 1e-4) return kd.toExponential(1);
        return kd.toFixed(4);
    }

    function drawAxes() {
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.28)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';

        for (let decade = 3; decade <= 8; decade += 1) {
            const re = Math.pow(10, decade);
            const x = xFromRe(re);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x, plot.top);
            ctx.lineTo(x, plot.bottom);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText('10^' + decade, x - 14, plot.bottom + 28);
        }

        const lambdaTicks = [0.008, 0.01, 0.015, 0.02, 0.03, 0.04, 0.06, 0.08, 0.1];
        lambdaTicks.forEach((tick) => {
            const y = yFromLambda(tick);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(plot.left, y);
            ctx.lineTo(plot.right, y);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.fillText(tick.toFixed(tick < 0.01 ? 3 : 2), 42, y + 4);
        });

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#e2e8f0';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(plot.left, plot.top);
        ctx.lineTo(plot.left, plot.bottom);
        ctx.lineTo(plot.right, plot.bottom);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Reynoldsov broj Re', plot.left + (plot.right - plot.left) / 2 - 62, canvas.height - 28);
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(26, plot.top + (plot.bottom - plot.top) / 2 + 42);
        ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2);
        ctx.fillText('Koeficijent trenja λ', 0, 0);
        ctx.restore();
    }

    function plotCurve(kd, color) {
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = kd === 0 ? 2.8 : 1.8;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let started = false;
        for (let logRe = 3; logRe <= 8; logRe += 0.025) {
            const re = Math.pow(10, logRe);
            if (kd !== 0 && re < 2800) continue;
            const lambda = solveLambda(re, kd === 0 ? 1e-10 : kd);
            if (lambda < 0.008 || lambda > 0.12) continue;
            const x = xFromRe(re);
            const y = yFromLambda(lambda);
            if (!started) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                started = true;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawCurrentPoint(re, lambda, regime) {
        const x = xFromRe(re);
        const y = yFromLambda(lambda);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(248,250,252,0.35)';
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x, plot.bottom);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y);
        ctx.lineTo(plot.left, y);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = regime.color;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(x, y, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('radna točka', x + 12, y - 10);
    }

    function draw(re, kd, lambda, regime) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(34,197,94,0.16)';
        ctx.fillRect(plot.left, plot.top, xFromRe(2320) - plot.left, plot.bottom - plot.top);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(245,158,11,0.16)';
        ctx.fillRect(xFromRe(2320), plot.top, xFromRe(4000) - xFromRe(2320), plot.bottom - plot.top);

        drawAxes();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fbbf24';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.8;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let started = false;
        for (let reLam = 700; reLam <= 2300; reLam += 25) {
            const lam = 64 / reLam;
            const x = xFromRe(reLam);
            const y = yFromLambda(lam);
            if (!started) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                started = true;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        roughnessCurves.forEach((curve, index) => plotCurve(curve, curveColors[index]));
        drawCurrentPoint(re, lambda, regime);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('laminarno', xFromRe(1250) - 32, plot.top + 24);
        ctx.fillText('prijelaz', xFromRe(2850) - 24, plot.top + 24);
        ctx.fillText('turbulentne krivulje hrapavosti', xFromRe(2e5), plot.top + 24);

        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        roughnessCurves.slice(2).forEach((curve, index) => {
            const sampleRe = 5e7;
            const x = xFromRe(sampleRe) + 6;
            const y = yFromLambda(solveLambda(sampleRe, curve));
            if (y > plot.top + 12 && y < plot.bottom - 8) {
                ctx.fillStyle = curveColors[index + 2];
                ctx.fillText('k/D ' + formatKd(curve), x, y + 4);
            }
        });
    }

    function update() {
        const logRe = parseFloat(reS.value);
        const re = Math.pow(10, logRe);
        const kd = Math.pow(10, parseFloat(kdS.value));
        const lambda = solveLambda(re, kd);
        const regime = classifyRegime(re);

        document.getElementById('v13-v-re').textContent = logRe.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v13-v-kd').textContent = formatKd(kd);
        document.getElementById('v13-res-lambda').textContent = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('v13-res-regime').textContent = regime.label;
        document.getElementById('v13-re-card').textContent = re.toExponential(2);
        document.getElementById('v13-rule-card').textContent = regime.rule;
        document.getElementById('v13-kd-card').textContent = formatKd(kd);
        document.getElementById('v13-explainer').textContent = `Za Re ≈ ${re.toExponential(2)} i k/D = ${formatKd(kd)} nalaziš se u ${regime.label} području. Zato se λ očitava kao ${lambda.toFixed(4)}, pri čemu je pravilo ${regime.rule}. Pomak točke udesno znači jače inercijske učinke, a pomak prema gore veći otpor trenja.`;

        draw(re, kd, lambda, regime);
    }

    reS.oninput = update;
    kdS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Laminarni pad tlaka (Hagen-Poiseuille) -->
<div id="z120-laminar-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #d8e7f7;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 72ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0f2fe, #eff6ff);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfdff 0%, #eff6ff 100%);
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-pressures {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-pressure,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-state,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-controls,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-metric,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-physics,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-pressure {
            padding: 16px;
            text-align: center;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-pressure small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z120-p1-gauge,
        #z120-p2-gauge {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.35rem;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z120-p1-gauge {
            color: #1d4ed8;
        }
        #z120-p2-gauge {
            color: #dc2626;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-state {
            padding: 18px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ebf8ff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-state-title,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-physics-title {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-state-title {
            color: #2c5282;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            color: #1e293b;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-row + .z120-row {
            margin-top: 8px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-row + .z120-row.is-divider {
            border-top: 1px solid #bee3f8;
            padding-top: 8px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-controls,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-physics,
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-control + .z120-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-side {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-physics {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%);
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-physics-title {
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z120-laminar-widget .z120-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-head,
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-summary,
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-lower,
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-pressures,
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z120-laminar-widget .z120-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z120-shell">
        <div class="z120-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z120-kicker">Z120 laminarni gubici</div>
                <h4 class="z120-title">Temperatura ovdje ne djeluje izravno na pad tlaka nego prvo mijenja viskoznost, a tek onda cijeli lanac otpora</h4>
                <p class="z120-sub">Widget sada prvo pokazuje cijev i usporedbu ulaznog i izlaznog tlaka, zatim sažetak stanja `Re`, `Δp` i `h_w`, a tek ispod kontrole i mikrometrike `μ` i `λ`. Time je važniji uzročno-posljedični redoslijed `T -> μ -> Re -> λ -> Δp` vidljiv bez prekrivanja scene.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z120-chip">T -> μ -> Re -> λ -> Δp</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z120-note"><strong>Kako čitati laminarni slučaj:</strong> Ovdje temperatura najprije mijenja dinamičku viskoznost <strong>μ</strong>, a tek to mijenja Reynoldsov broj i koeficijent trenja <strong>λ = 64/Re</strong>. Zato je lanac <strong>T -> μ -> Re -> λ -> Δp</strong> važniji od samog završnog pada tlaka.</div>

        <div class="z120-stage">
            <div class="z120-scene">
                <canvas id="z120-canvas" width="550" height="400"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z120-summary">
                <div class="z120-pressures">
                    <div class="z120-pressure">
                        <small>Ulaz p1</small>
                        <strong id="z120-p1-gauge">200 kPa</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z120-pressure">
                        <small>Izlaz p2</small>
                        <strong id="z120-p2-gauge">11.8 kPa</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="z120-state">
                    <div class="z120-state-title">Fizikalna stanja</div>
                    <div class="z120-row"><span>Reynolds Re</span><b id="z120-res-re">1836</b></div>
                    <div class="z120-row"><span>Pad tlaka Δp</span><b id="z120-res-dp">188.2 kPa</b></div>
                    <div class="z120-row is-divider"><span>Gubitak h<wbr>w</span><b id="z120-res-hw">19.2 m</b></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z120-lower">
            <div class="z120-controls">
                <div class="z120-control">
                    <label>Temperatura T: <span id="z120-v-T" style="color:#2563eb;">10</span> °C</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z120-T-slider" min="5" max="80" step="1" value="10">
                </div>
                <div class="z120-control">
                    <label>Brzina v: <span id="z120-v-v" style="color:#2563eb;">1.2</span> m/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z120-v-slider" min="0.1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.2">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z120-side">
                <div class="z120-metrics">
                    <div class="z120-metric">
                        <small>μ</small>
                        <strong id="z120-res-mu">0.0000 Pa s</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z120-metric">
                        <small>λ = 64/Re</small>
                        <strong id="z120-res-lambda">0.0000</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="z120-physics">
                    <div class="z120-physics-title">Fizikalni uvid</div>
                    Kod laminarnog strujanja pad tlaka je direktno proporcionalan brzini i viskoznosti. Kako temperatura raste, viskoznost vode opada, pa isti tok traži sve manji utrošak energije.
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z120-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z120-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z120-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const tS = document.getElementById('z120-T-slider');
    const vS = document.getElementById('z120-v-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for (let index = 0; index < 100; index++) {
        particles.push({ t: Math.random(), yRel: Math.random() * 2 - 1 });
    }

    const state = { v: 1.2 };

    function getViscosity(T) {
        return 0.00179 / (1 + 0.0337 * T + 0.00022 * T * T);
    }

    function update() {
        const T = parseFloat(tS.value);
        const v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const L = 15;
        const d = 0.002;
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;
        const mu = getViscosity(T);

        const Re = (rho * v * d) / mu;
        const lambda = 64 / Re;
        const dp = lambda * (L / d) * (rho * v * v / 2) / 1000;
        const hw = (dp * 1000) / (rho * g);

        state.v = v;

        document.getElementById('z120-v-T').innerText = T;
        document.getElementById('z120-v-v').innerText = v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z120-res-re').innerText = Math.round(Re);
        document.getElementById('z120-res-dp').innerText = dp.toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z120-res-hw').innerText = hw.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z120-res-mu').innerText = mu.toFixed(5) + ' Pa s';
        document.getElementById('z120-res-lambda').innerText = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z120-p2-gauge').innerText = Math.max(0, 200 - dp).toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z120-explainer').textContent = `Pri temperaturi ${T.toFixed(0)}°C dinamička viskoznost je ${mu.toFixed(5)} Pa s, pa za brzinu ${v.toFixed(1)} m/s dobivaš Re ≈ ${Math.round(Re)} i laminarni koeficijent λ = ${lambda.toFixed(4)}. To vodi do pada tlaka ${dp.toFixed(1)} kPa i gubitka energije ${hw.toFixed(1)} m.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 400);
        const cy = 200;
        const dPx = 100;

        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(50, 0, 500, 0);
        grad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)');
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(50, cy - dPx / 2, 450, dPx);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(50, cy - dPx / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(500, cy - dPx / 2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(50, cy + dPx / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(500, cy + dPx / 2);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.3)';
        ctx.setLineDash([2, 2]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let y = -dPx / 2; y <= dPx / 2; y += 5) {
            const rRel = Math.abs(y) / (dPx / 2);
            const vx = (1 - rRel * rRel) * 80;
            if (y === -dPx / 2) ctx.moveTo(50 + vx, cy + y);
            else ctx.lineTo(50 + vx, cy + y);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            const rRel = Math.abs(particle.yRel);
            const vLocal = 2 * state.v * (1 - rRel * rRel);
            particle.t += 0.005 * vLocal;
            if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;

            const px = 50 + particle.t * 450;
            const py = cy + particle.yRel * (dPx / 2 - 5);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    tS.oninput = update;
    vS.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z121 — Turbulentno strujanje zraka {.unnumbered}

Zrak struji kroz 7 m dug pravokutni ventilacijski kanal dimenzija $150 \times 200\,\text{mm}$. Kanal je izrađen od pocinčanog lima ($k=4,5 \cdot 10^{-5}\,\text{m}$), tlak zraka je $101325\,\text{Pa}$, temperatura $35^\circ\text{C}$, a srednja brzina strujanja $7\,\text{m/s}$.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$L=7\,\text{m}$, $b=200\,\text{mm}$, $h=150\,\text{mm}$, $p=101325\,\text{Pa}$, $t=35^\circ\text{C}$, $v_{sr}=7\,\text{m/s}$, $k=0,045\,\text{mm}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\Delta p$; $P$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $d_{ekv} = \frac{4A}{O} = \mathbf{0,1714 \, \text{m}}$.
2. $Re = \mathbf{72507}$ (Turbulentno).
3. $\lambda = \mathbf{0,0204}$ (uz $k/d = 0,00026$).
4. $\Delta p = \mathbf{23,3 \, \text{Pa}}, P = \dot{V} \Delta p = \mathbf{4,9 \, \text{W}}$.

***

### Zadatak Z122 — Difuzor s lokalnim gubicima {.unnumbered}

Horizontalna cijev promjera 60 mm postupno povećava promjer na 90 mm. Stjenke dijela koji se širi otklonjene su od horizontalne osi pod kutom od 30°. Srednja brzina i tlak vode prije difuzora iznose 7 m/s i 150 kPa. Potrebno je odrediti pad visine dobave u difuzoru i tlak u cijevi većeg promjera.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$d_1=60\,\text{mm}$, $d_2=90\,\text{mm}$, $\alpha=30^\circ$, $v_1=7\,\text{m/s}$, $p_1=150\,\text{kPa}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h_{wm}$; $p_2$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $v_2 = 3,11 \, \text{m/s}$.
2. $h_{wm} = \zeta \frac{v_1^2}{2g} = \mathbf{0,175 \, \text{m}}$.
3.

    $$
    p_2 = p_1 + \rho \left( \frac{\beta v_1^2 - \beta v_2^2}{2} - g h_{wm} \right)
    = \mathbf{169,1 \, \text{kPa}}
    $$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Difuzor i lokalni gubici -->
<div id="z122-diffuser-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #d8e7f7;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dbeafe, #ecfeff);
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            color: #0369a1;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fafc 0%, #eef6ff 100%);
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(240px, 0.88fr) minmax(0, 1.12fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-status,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-balance,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-metric,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-controls,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-physics,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.06);
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-status {
            padding: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-status-title,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-balance-title,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-physics-title {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-status-title {
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-status-copy {
            margin: 0;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z122-sep-warn {
            display: none;
            margin-top: 14px;
            padding: 10px 12px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ef4444, #fb7185);
            color: #ffffff;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.03em;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 12px 22px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.22);
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-summary-side {
            display: grid;
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-balance {
            padding: 18px 20px;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-left: 6px solid #f97316;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-balance-title {
            color: #9a3412;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            color: #1e293b;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-row + .z122-row {
            margin-top: 8px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-controls,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-physics,
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-control + .z122-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-physics {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%);
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-physics-title {
            color: #334155;
        }
        #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-head,
            #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-summary,
            #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-lower,
            #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z122-diffuser-widget .z122-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z122-shell">
        <div class="z122-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z122-kicker">Z122 difuzor</div>
                <h4 class="z122-title">Dobitak tlaka vrijedi samo dok difuzor širi tok dovoljno nježno da granični sloj ostane priljubljen uz stijenku</h4>
                <p class="z122-sub">Ovaj polish čita difuzor istim redoslijedom kao novije widgete: najprije vidiš širenje scene, zatim stanje odvajanja i bilancu učinaka, a tek onda podešavaš kut i ulaznu brzinu.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z122-chip">v₁ -> v₂ -> p₂</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z122-note"><strong>Kako čitati difuzor:</strong> U urednom difuzoru strujnice se otvaraju glatko, brzina pada s <strong>v₁</strong> na <strong>v₂</strong>, a dio brzinske visine vraća se u tlak. Kad kut postane prevelik, granični sloj se odvaja od stijenke i uz zid nastaju vrtložne zone koje pretvaraju dobitak u dodatni lokalni gubitak.</div>

        <div class="z122-stage">
            <div class="z122-scene">
                <canvas id="z122-canvas" width="920" height="440"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z122-summary">
                <div class="z122-status">
                    <div class="z122-status-title">Stanje graničnog sloja</div>
                    <p class="z122-status-copy">Mali kutovi dopuštaju uredan povrat tlaka. Veći kut tjera tok da se odlijepi od stijenke, pa dio dobitka odlazi u vrtložne zone i dodatne gubitke.</p>
                    <div id="z122-sep-warn">ODVAJANJE STRUJE UZ STIJENKU</div>
                </div>
                <div class="z122-summary-side">
                    <div class="z122-balance">
                        <div class="z122-balance-title">Bilanca učinaka</div>
                        <div class="z122-row"><span>Koeficijent ζ</span><b id="z122-res-zeta">0.07</b></div>
                        <div class="z122-row"><span>Lokalni gubitak hwm</span><b id="z122-res-hwm">0.18 m</b></div>
                        <div class="z122-row"><span>Izlazni tlak p₂</span><b id="z122-res-p2" style="color:#c2410c;">169.1 kPa</b></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z122-metrics">
                        <div class="z122-metric"><small>v₂</small><strong id="z122-res-v2">0.00 m/s</strong></div>
                        <div class="z122-metric"><small>Δ(v²/2g)</small><strong id="z122-res-dhead">0.00 m</strong></div>
                        <div class="z122-metric"><small>Režim kuta</small><strong id="z122-res-regime">miran</strong></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z122-lower">
            <div class="z122-controls">
                <div class="z122-control">
                    <label>Kut širenja α: <span id="z122-v-alpha" style="color:#2563eb;">30</span>°</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z122-alpha-slider" min="5" max="60" step="1" value="30">
                </div>
                <div class="z122-control">
                    <label>Ulazna brzina v₁: <span id="z122-v-v1" style="color:#2563eb;">7.0</span> m/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z122-v1-slider" min="1" max="15" step="0.5" value="7">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z122-physics">
                <div class="z122-physics-title">Fizikalni uvid</div>
                Difuzor idealno pretvara dio brzinske visine natrag u tlak. No čim se širenje previše agresivno otvori, tok više ne prati stijenu i lokalni gubitak brzo raste unatoč nižoj izlaznoj brzini.
            </div>

            <div class="z122-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z122-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z122-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const aS = document.getElementById('z122-alpha-slider');
    const v1S = document.getElementById('z122-v1-slider');
    const lanes = [-0.82, -0.62, -0.42, -0.22, 0, 0.22, 0.42, 0.62, 0.82];
    const particles = [];
    const state = { alpha: 30, v1: 7, v2: 3.11, zeta: 0.07, hwm: 0.18, deltaHead: 0.18, p2: 169.1, separated: true, regime: 'odvajanje', time: 0 };

    lanes.forEach((lane, laneIndex) => {
        for (let index = 0; index < 8; index++) {
            particles.push({ lane, phase: (index / 8 + laneIndex * 0.03) % 1, bias: 0.9 + Math.random() * 0.25 });
        }
    });

    function getZeta(alpha) {
        if (alpha <= 8) return 0.05 + (8 - alpha) * 0.004;
        if (alpha <= 14) return 0.05 + (alpha - 8) * 0.02;
        if (alpha <= 25) return 0.17 + (alpha - 14) * 0.03;
        return 0.5 + (alpha - 25) * 0.045;
    }

    function getGeometry(alpha) {
        const cy = canvas.height / 2 + 18;
        const halfIn = 34;
        const halfOut = 68;
        const inletStart = 44;
        const inletEnd = 210;
        const diffL = Math.max(150, Math.min(320, (halfOut - halfIn) / Math.tan(alpha * Math.PI / 180)));
        const outletStart = inletEnd + diffL;
        const outletEnd = canvas.width - 56;
        return { cy, halfIn, halfOut, inletStart, inletEnd, diffL, outletStart, outletEnd };
    }

    function getHalfHeight(x, geometry) {
        if (x <= geometry.inletEnd) return geometry.halfIn;
        if (x <= geometry.outletStart) {
            const t = (x - geometry.inletEnd) / geometry.diffL;
            return geometry.halfIn + t * (geometry.halfOut - geometry.halfIn);
        }
        return geometry.halfOut;
    }

    function streamlineY(x, lane, geometry, separated) {
        const half = getHalfHeight(x, geometry) - 8;
        let localLane = lane;
        if (separated && x > geometry.inletEnd + 0.35 * geometry.diffL && Math.abs(lane) > 0.58) {
            const t = Math.min(1, (x - (geometry.inletEnd + 0.35 * geometry.diffL)) / (0.65 * geometry.diffL));
            localLane = lane * (1 - 0.32 * t);
        }
        return geometry.cy + localLane * half;
    }

    function update() {
        const alpha = parseFloat(aS.value);
        const v1 = parseFloat(v1S.value);
        const p1 = 150;
        const rho = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;
        const d1 = 0.06;
        const d2 = 0.09;
        const v2 = v1 * Math.pow(d1 / d2, 2);
        const zeta = getZeta(alpha);
        const hwm = zeta * (v1 * v1 / (2 * g));
        const deltaHead = (v1 * v1 - v2 * v2) / (2 * g);
        const p2 = p1 + (rho * (((v1 * v1) - (v2 * v2)) / 2 - g * hwm)) / 1000;
        const regime = alpha <= 10 ? 'povoljno' : (alpha <= 18 ? 'granično' : 'odvajanje');

        state.alpha = alpha;
        state.v1 = v1;
        state.v2 = v2;
        state.zeta = zeta;
        state.hwm = hwm;
        state.deltaHead = deltaHead;
        state.p2 = p2;
        state.separated = alpha > 18;
        state.regime = regime;

        document.getElementById('z122-v-alpha').textContent = alpha.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z122-v-v1').textContent = v1.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z122-res-zeta').textContent = zeta.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z122-res-hwm').textContent = hwm.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-p2').textContent = p2.toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-v2').textContent = v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-dhead').textContent = deltaHead.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z122-res-regime').textContent = regime;
        document.getElementById('z122-explainer').textContent = `Za kut ${alpha.toFixed(0)}° i ulaznu brzinu ${v1.toFixed(1)} m/s idealno bi se moglo vratiti ${deltaHead.toFixed(2)} m brzinske visine. No stvarni difuzor pritom gubi ${hwm.toFixed(2)} m zbog lokalnog otpora, pa izlazni tlak završava na ${p2.toFixed(1)} kPa. Kad kut pređe približno 18°, uz stijenku se pojavljuju vrtložne zone odvajanja.`;
        document.getElementById('z122-sep-warn').style.display = state.separated ? 'block' : 'none';
    }

    function draw() {
        state.time += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const geometry = getGeometry(state.alpha);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut, 0, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, '#dbeafe');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, '#bfdbfe');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(geometry.inletStart, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletEnd, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletEnd, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletStart, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.inletEnd, geometry.cy + geometry.halfIn);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.22)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.4;
        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let x = geometry.inletStart; x <= geometry.outletEnd; x += 10) {
                const wiggle = (state.regime === 'povoljno' ? 0 : state.regime === 'granično' ? 2.5 : 4.5) * Math.sin((x * 0.025) + state.time * 0.015 + lane * 4) * (Math.abs(lane) * 0.65);
                const y = streamlineY(x, lane, geometry, state.separated) + wiggle;
                if (x === geometry.inletStart) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            const laneSpeed = 0.55 + (1 - Math.abs(particle.lane)) * 0.65;
            particle.phase = (particle.phase + 0.0018 * state.v1 * laneSpeed * particle.bias) % 1;
            const x = geometry.inletStart + particle.phase * (geometry.outletEnd - geometry.inletStart);
            const wiggle = (state.regime === 'povoljno' ? 0 : state.regime === 'granično' ? 2.5 : 4.5) * Math.sin((x * 0.025) + state.time * 0.015 + particle.lane * 4) * (Math.abs(particle.lane) * 0.65);
            const y = streamlineY(x, particle.lane, geometry, state.separated) + wiggle;
            ctx.fillStyle = Math.abs(particle.lane) > 0.62 && state.separated ? '#f97316' : '#2563eb';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        if (state.separated) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(249,115,22,0.9)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            [geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut + 22, geometry.cy + geometry.halfOut - 22].forEach((yCenter, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(geometry.outletStart + 70, yCenter, 18, index === 0 ? Math.PI * 0.1 : Math.PI * 1.1, index === 0 ? Math.PI * 1.85 : Math.PI * 0.85, index !== 0);
                ctx.stroke();
            });
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f766e';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(geometry.inletEnd + 10, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 42);
        ctx.lineTo(geometry.outletStart - 10, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 42);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f766e';
        ctx.font = '700 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('pad v i mogući povrat tlaka', geometry.inletEnd + 18, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 50);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('v₁ = ' + state.v1.toFixed(1) + ' m/s', 34, geometry.cy - geometry.halfIn - 14);
        ctx.fillText('v₂ = ' + state.v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s', canvas.width - 160, geometry.cy - geometry.halfOut - 14);

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    aS.oninput = update;
    v1S.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z123 — Protok između dva spremnika {.unnumbered}

Voda temperature 10°C struji iz većeg spremnika u manji kroz cijev promjera 50 mm izrađene od sivog lijeva. Hrapavost iznosi $2,6 \cdot 10^{-4} \, \text{m}$, dok su koeficijenti mjesnih gubitaka redom: $\zeta_u = 0,5$ (ulaz), $\zeta_k = 0,3$ (koljeno), $\zeta_v = 0,2$ (ventil), $\zeta_i = 1,06$ (izlaz).

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$t=10^\circ\text{C}$, $d=50\,\text{mm}$, $L=80\,\text{m}$, $h=9\,\text{m}$, $\dot{V}=6\,\text{L/s}$, $k=0,26\,\text{mm}$, $z_2=4\,\text{m}$, $\sum \zeta = 2,36$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$z_1$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $v = 3,06 \, \text{m/s}, Re = 116865, \lambda = 0,0315$.
2. $\sum \zeta = 2,36$.
3.

    $$
    h_w = \frac{v^2}{2g} \left( 2,36 + 0,0315 \frac{89}{0,05} \right)
    = \mathbf{27,8 \, \text{m}}
    $$
4. $z_1 = z_2 + h_w = \mathbf{31,8 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Budžet gubitaka cjevovoda -->
<div id="z123-budget-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #dde6f4;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f9fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fef3c7, #ffedd5);
            border: 1px solid #fdba74;
            color: #c2410c;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
            background: #f8fafc;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(240px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-controls,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total {
            padding: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #ffffff);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z123-hw-total {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.6rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-total span {
            display: block;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-controls,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown,
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-control + .z123-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-title {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            color: #64748b;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-track {
            display: flex;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #e2e8f0;
        }
        #z123-bar-friction,
        #z123-bar-local {
            height: 100%;
        }
        #z123-bar-friction {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f97316, #fb923c);
        }
        #z123-bar-local {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa);
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-legend {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-legend span:first-child {
            color: #ea580c;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-breakdown-legend span:last-child {
            color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-head,
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-summary,
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-lower,
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z123-budget-widget .z123-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z123-shell">
        <div class="z123-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z123-kicker">Z123 budžet gubitaka</div>
                <h4 class="z123-title">Tek kad razdvojiš linijske i lokalne gubitke postaje jasno koliko visoku uzvodnu kotu sustav doista traži</h4>
                <p class="z123-sub">Widget sada prvo prikazuje energijsku sliku između spremnika, odmah ispod daje ukupni gubitak i ključne brojeve `Re`, `λ` i `z₁`, a tek niže razlaže koliko otpada na trenje duž cijevi, a koliko na lokalne elemente.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z123-chip">h_w = h_w,lin + h_w,loc</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z123-note"><strong>Kako čitati budžet:</strong> Prvo iz protoka i hrapavosti dobivaš <strong>Re</strong> i <strong>λ</strong>, zatim razdvajaš linijske i lokalne gubitke u istom cjevovodu. Tek njihov zbroj daje ukupni gubitak <strong>h_w</strong>, a on određuje potrebnu kotu slobodne površine <strong>z₁</strong>.</div>

        <div class="z123-stage">
            <div class="z123-scene">
                <canvas id="z123-canvas" width="520" height="520"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z123-summary">
                <div class="z123-total">
                    <small>Ukupni gubitak h_w</small>
                    <strong id="z123-hw-total">27.8 m</strong>
                    <span>To je ukupna visina energije koju cjevovod mora potrošiti između uzvodnog i nizvodnog spremnika.</span>
                </div>
                <div class="z123-metrics">
                    <div class="z123-metric"><small>Re</small><strong id="z123-re-card">0</strong></div>
                    <div class="z123-metric"><small>λ</small><strong id="z123-lambda-card">0.0000</strong></div>
                    <div class="z123-metric"><small>z₁</small><strong id="z123-z1-card">0.0 m</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z123-lower">
            <div class="z123-controls">
                <div class="z123-control">
                    <label>Protok Q: <span id="z123-v-vdot" style="color:#2563eb;">6.0</span> L/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z123-vdot-slider" min="1" max="15" step="0.5" value="6">
                </div>
                <div class="z123-control">
                    <label>Hrapavost k: <span id="z123-v-k" style="color:#2563eb;">0.26</span> mm</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z123-k-slider" min="0.01" max="1.0" step="0.01" value="0.26">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z123-breakdown">
                <div class="z123-breakdown-title">Raspodjela otpora [%]</div>
                <div class="z123-track">
                    <div id="z123-bar-friction" style="width: 90%;" title="Trenje u cijevi"></div>
                    <div id="z123-bar-local" style="width: 10%;" title="Lokalni gubici"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="z123-breakdown-legend">
                    <span>LINIJSKI (Trenje)</span>
                    <span>LOKALNI (Zeta)</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z123-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z123-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z123-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vdotS = document.getElementById('z123-vdot-slider'), kS = document.getElementById('z123-k-slider');

    function solveLambda(Re, kd) {
        if (Re < 2320) return 64 / Re;
        let f = 0.02;
        for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            f = 1 / Math.pow(-2 * Math.log10(kd / 3.7 + 2.51 / (Re * Math.sqrt(f))), 2);
        }
        return f;
    }

    function update() {
        const vdot_l = parseFloat(vdotS.value), k_mm = parseFloat(kS.value);
        const d = 0.05, L = 89, rho = 1000, mu = 0.0013, g = 9.81;
        const A = Math.PI * d * d / 4;
        const v = (vdot_l / 1000) / A;
        const Re = (rho * v * d) / mu;
        const lambda = solveLambda(Re, k_mm / (d * 1000));

        const hw_lin = lambda * (L / d) * (v * v / (2 * g));
        const sum_zeta = 2.36;
        const hw_loc = sum_zeta * (v * v / (2 * g));
        const hw_total = hw_lin + hw_loc;
        const z1 = 4 + hw_total;

        const perc_lin = (hw_lin / hw_total) * 100;

        document.getElementById('z123-v-vdot').innerText = vdot_l.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z123-v-k').innerText = k_mm.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z123-hw-total').innerText = hw_total.toFixed(1) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z123-bar-friction').style.width = perc_lin + "%";
        document.getElementById('z123-bar-local').style.width = (100 - perc_lin) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z123-re-card').textContent = Math.round(Re);
        document.getElementById('z123-lambda-card').textContent = lambda.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z123-z1-card').textContent = z1.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('z123-explainer').textContent = `Za protok ${vdot_l.toFixed(1)} L/s i hrapavost ${k_mm.toFixed(2)} mm dobivaš Re ≈ ${Math.round(Re)} i λ = ${lambda.toFixed(4)}. Linijski gubitak tada iznosi ${hw_lin.toFixed(1)} m, lokalni ${hw_loc.toFixed(1)} m, pa ukupni gubitak ${hw_total.toFixed(1)} m traži uzvodnu kotu z₁ ≈ ${z1.toFixed(1)} m.`;

        draw(hw_total, hw_lin, hw_loc);
    }

    function draw(hwt, hlin, hloc) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const oy = canvas.height - 44;
        const totalHead = 4 + hwt;
        const topPadding = 84;
        const scale = Math.min(10, (oy - topPadding) / Math.max(totalHead, 6));
        const sourceX = 28;
        const tankWidth = 92;
        const targetX = canvas.width - 120;
        const sourceTop = oy - totalHead * scale;
        const targetTop = oy - 4 * scale;
        const pipeY = oy - 24;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#ebf8ff';
        ctx.fillRect(sourceX, sourceTop, tankWidth, totalHead * scale);
        ctx.fillRect(targetX, targetTop, tankWidth, 4 * scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(sourceX, sourceTop, tankWidth, totalHead * scale);
        ctx.strokeRect(targetX, targetTop, tankWidth, 4 * scale);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, pipeY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, sourceTop);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, targetTop - 6);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(sourceX + tankWidth, sourceTop + 10);
        ctx.lineTo(targetX, targetTop + 6);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('EGL', sourceX + tankWidth + 8, Math.max(28, sourceTop - 10));
        ctx.fillText('HGL', sourceX + tankWidth + 8, Math.max(44, sourceTop + 14));
        ctx.fillText('z1 = ' + totalHead.toFixed(1) + ' m', sourceX + 4, Math.max(26, sourceTop - 14));
        ctx.fillText('z2 = 4.0 m', targetX + 8, targetTop - 14);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('hw,lin = ' + hlin.toFixed(1) + ' m', canvas.width / 2 - 96, sourceTop + (targetTop - sourceTop) * 0.35);
        ctx.fillText('hw,loc = ' + hloc.toFixed(1) + ' m', canvas.width / 2 - 96, sourceTop + (targetTop - sourceTop) * 0.62);
    }

    vdotS.oninput = update; kS.oninput = update; update();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak Z124 — Paralelni cjevovodi {.unnumbered}

Voda temperature 20°C crpi se iz spremnika A u spremnik B putem dviju paralelnih cijevi duljine 36 m. Volumenski protok na izlazu iz pumpe iznosi 30 L/s. Zanemarujemo mjesne gubitke na račvi, sastavištu i koljenima.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$t=20^\circ\text{C}$, $L=36\,\text{m}$, $d_1=40\,\text{mm}$, $d_2=80\,\text{mm}$, $\dot{V}_{tot}=30\,\text{L/s}$, $k=0,045\,\text{mm}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_R$; $\dot{V}_1$; $\dot{V}_2$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. $v_2 = v_1 \sqrt{\frac{\lambda_1 d_2}{\lambda_2 d_1}} = 1,56 v_1$.
2.

    $$
    \dot{V}_{tot} = A_1 v_1 + A_2 (1,56 v_1)
    $$

    $$
    v_1 = \mathbf{3,29 \, \text{m/s}}, \qquad v_2 = \mathbf{5,15 \, \text{m/s}}
    $$
3. $\dot{V}_1 = \mathbf{4,1 \, \text{L/s}}, \dot{V}_2 = \mathbf{25,9 \, \text{L/s}}$.
4. $H_{pump} = (z_B - z_A) + h_{wl1} = \mathbf{18,93 \, \text{m}}$.

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Paralelne cijevi i raspodjela protoka -->
<div id="z124-parallel-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #d7f0eb;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fffd 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 26px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dcfce7, #ecfeff);
            border: 1px solid #a7f3d0;
            color: #047857;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f9fcff 0%, #eef6ff 100%);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(240px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-controls,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            background: #ffffff;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.06);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure {
            padding: 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f0fdf4);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z124-pr-val {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #1d4ed8;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-pressure span {
            display: block;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metrics {
            display: grid;
