```{=html}
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metric strong {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-size: 0.98rem;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-controls,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split,
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-control + .z124-control {
            margin-top: 18px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-control label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #475569;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-control input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ecfeff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            border-left: 6px solid #0ea5e9;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split-title {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            color: #0f4c81;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-bar-label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            color: #1e293b;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-track {
            height: 10px;
            background: #dbeafe;
            border-radius: 999px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        #z124-bar-v1,
        #z124-bar-v2 {
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 999px;
        }
        #z124-bar-v1 {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa);
        }
        #z124-bar-v2 {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #34d399);
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-split-item + .z124-split-item {
            margin-top: 14px;
        }
        #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-head,
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-summary,
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-lower,
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
            #z124-parallel-widget .z124-explainer {
                grid-column: auto;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="z124-shell">
        <div class="z124-head">
            <div>
                <div class="z124-kicker">Z124 paralelne grane</div>
                <h4 class="z124-title">Raspodjela protoka ne bira se “po osjećaju”, nego iz uvjeta da obje grane troše istu visinu energije</h4>
                <p class="z124-sub">Novi raspored prvo izdvaja samu mrežu cijevi, odmah ispod daje tlak u račvi i ključne brzine, a zatim odvojeno pokazuje koje dvije kontrole mijenjaju odnos otpora i kako se protok dijeli između grana.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="z124-chip">h<wbr>w,1 = h<wbr>w,2</div>
        </div>

        <div class="z124-note"><strong>Kako čitati paralelne grane:</strong> U obje grane pad energije mora biti isti, pa raspodjela ne ovisi proizvoljno o protoku nego o hidrauličkom otporu svake grane. Šira cijev zato preuzima veći dio ukupnog protoka jer za isti gubitak može nositi veću brzinu.</div>

        <div class="z124-stage">
            <div class="z124-scene">
                <canvas id="z124-canvas" width="550" height="400"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="z124-summary">
                <div class="z124-pressure">
                    <small>Tlak u račvi p_R</small>
                    <strong id="z124-pr-val">--- kPa</strong>
                    <span>To je raspoloživi tlak u točki gdje se ukupni protok dijeli na dvije grane koje moraju završiti s istim gubitkom energije.</span>
                </div>
                <div class="z124-metrics">
                    <div class="z124-metric">
                        <small>v₁</small>
                        <strong id="z124-v1-card">0.00 m/s</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z124-metric">
                        <small>v₂</small>
                        <strong id="z124-v2-card">0.00 m/s</strong>
                    </div>
                    <div class="z124-metric">
                        <small>v₂/v₁</small>
                        <strong id="z124-ratio-card">0.00</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="z124-lower">
            <div class="z124-controls">
                <div class="z124-control">
                    <label>Ukupni protok Q_tot: <span id="z124-v-vtot" style="color:#2563eb;">30</span> L/s</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z124-vtot-slider" min="10" max="60" step="1" value="30">
                </div>
                <div class="z124-control">
                    <label>Promjer cijevi 2 (D2): <span id="z124-v-d2" style="color:#2563eb;">80</span> mm</label>
                    <input type="range" id="z124-d2-slider" min="40" max="120" step="5" value="80">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z124-split">
                <div class="z124-split-title">Raspodjela protoka</div>
                <div class="z124-split-item">
                    <div class="z124-bar-label"><span>Cijev 1 (40 mm)</span><b id="z124-v1-out">4.1 L/s</b></div>
                    <div class="z124-track"><div id="z124-bar-v1" style="width: 14%;"></div></div>
                </div>
                <div class="z124-split-item">
                    <div class="z124-bar-label"><span>Cijev 2 (<span id="z124-d2-label">80</span> mm)</span><b id="z124-v2-out">25.9 L/s</b></div>
                    <div class="z124-track"><div id="z124-bar-v2" style="width: 86%;"></div></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="z124-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z124-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z124-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vtotS = document.getElementById('z124-vtot-slider'), d2S = document.getElementById('z124-d2-slider');
    const state = { v1: 0, v2: 0, d1: 0.04, d2: 0.08, pr: 0, ratio: 0, vdot1: 0, vdot2: 0 };

    let particles = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random(), branch: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : 2 });

    function update() {
        const vtot_l = parseFloat(vtotS.value), d2_mm = parseFloat(d2S.value);
        const d1 = 0.04, d2 = d2_mm / 1000, L = 36, rho = 998, g = 9.81;
        const lam1 = 0.022, lam2 = 0.018;

        const ratio_v = Math.sqrt((lam1 * d2) / (lam2 * d1));
        const A1 = Math.PI * d1 * d1 / 4;
        const A2 = Math.PI * d2 * d2 / 4;

        const v1 = (vtot_l / 1000) / (A1 + A2 * ratio_v);
        const v2 = v1 * ratio_v;
        const vdot1 = A1 * v1 * 1000;
        const vdot2 = A2 * v2 * 1000;

        const hw = lam1 * (L / d1) * (v1 * v1 / (2 * g));
        const pr = (rho * g * (13 - 5 + hw)) / 1000;

        state.v1 = v1;
        state.v2 = v2;
        state.d1 = d1;
        state.d2 = d2;
        state.pr = pr;
        state.ratio = ratio_v;
        state.vdot1 = vdot1;
        state.vdot2 = vdot2;

        document.getElementById('z124-v-vtot').innerText = vtot_l;
        document.getElementById('z124-v-d2').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z124-d2-label').innerText = d2_mm;
        document.getElementById('z124-v1-out').innerText = vdot1.toFixed(1) + ' L/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-v2-out').innerText = vdot2.toFixed(1) + ' L/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-bar-v1').style.width = (vdot1 / vtot_l * 100) + '%';
        document.getElementById('z124-bar-v2').style.width = (vdot2 / vtot_l * 100) + '%';
        document.getElementById('z124-pr-val').innerText = pr.toFixed(1) + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('z124-v1-card').textContent = v1.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-v2-card').textContent = v2.toFixed(2) + ' m/s';
        document.getElementById('z124-ratio-card').textContent = ratio_v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z124-explainer').textContent = `Za ukupni protok ${vtot_l.toFixed(0)} L/s i promjer druge cijevi ${d2_mm.toFixed(0)} mm uvjet jednakog gubitka daje omjer brzina v₂/v₁ = ${ratio_v.toFixed(2)}. Zato prva grana nosi ${vdot1.toFixed(1)} L/s, druga ${vdot2.toFixed(1)} L/s, a tlak u račvi ispada ${pr.toFixed(1)} kPa.`;
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const cy = 200;
        const ox = 150;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fbff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(68, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width - 48, cy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox, cy, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ox + 250, cy, 15, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e0';
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineWidth = state.d1 * 500;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, cy - 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy - 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.lineWidth = state.d2 * 500;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox, cy + 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy + 80);
        ctx.lineTo(ox + 250, cy);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1e293b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('grana 1', ox + 92, cy - 106);
        ctx.fillText('grana 2', ox + 92, cy + 118);

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            const currentV = particle.branch === 1 ? state.v1 : state.v2;
            particle.t += 0.005 * currentV;
            if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;

            let px, py;
            const h = particle.branch === 1 ? -80 : 80;
            if (particle.t < 0.2) {
                px = ox;
                py = cy + (particle.t / 0.2) * h;
            } else if (particle.t < 0.8) {
                px = ox + ((particle.t - 0.2) / 0.6) * 250;
                py = cy + h;
            } else {
                px = ox + 250;
                py = cy + h - ((particle.t - 0.8) / 0.2) * h;
            }

            ctx.fillStyle = particle.branch === 1 ? '#3b82f6' : '#10b981';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Qtot', ox - 48, cy - 22);
        ctx.fillText('isti gubitak energije u obje grane', ox + 112, cy + 22);
    }

    function frame() {
        draw();
        requestAnimationFrame(frame);
    }

    vtotS.oninput = update;
    d2S.oninput = update;
    update();
    frame();
})();
</script>

```

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

```{=html}
<!-- Flow Regime / Reynolds Widget -->
<div id="reynolds-widget" style="max-width: 1060px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;">
    <style>
        #reynolds-widget .rw-shell {
            border-radius: 30px;
            border: 1px solid #dce9f7;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 28px 64px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09);
            padding: 28px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 18px;
            align-items: start;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-kicker {
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #64748b;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 1.95rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #0f172a;
            font-weight: 800;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-sub {
            margin: 8px 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #475569;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dcfce7, #dbeafe);
            border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
            color: #047857;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-note {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 14px 16px;
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff6ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.62;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-stage {
            display: grid;
            gap: 14px;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-scene {
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #1e293b;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #172554 0%, #0f172a 60%, #020617 100%);
        }
        #reynolds-widget canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #re-status,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-explainer {
            border-radius: 18px;
            border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.06);
        }
        #re-status {
            padding: 18px;
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metrics {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: center;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #64748b;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-metric strong,
        #re-dominant,
        #re-thresholds,
        #re-profile {
            display: block;
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #0f172a;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 0.92fr) minmax(0, 1.08fr);
            gap: 14px;
            align-items: start;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls,
        #reynolds-widget .rw-explainer {
            padding: 18px;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #475569;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-controls input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2563eb;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-model {
            margin-top: 10px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: #64748b;
            line-height: 1.55;
        }
        #reynolds-widget .rw-explainer {
            background: #fff7ed;
            border-color: #fdba74;
            color: #7c2d12;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        @media (max-width: 960px) {
            #reynolds-widget .rw-head,
            #reynolds-widget .rw-summary,
            #reynolds-widget .rw-lower,
            #reynolds-widget .rw-metrics {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #reynolds-widget .rw-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="rw-shell">
        <div class="rw-head">
            <div>
                <div class="rw-kicker">Reynoldsov broj</div>
                <h3 class="rw-title">Brzina ne mijenja samo broj na ekranu nego i samu prirodu toka: od urednih slojeva do vrtložnog miješanja</h3>
                <p class="rw-sub">Ovdje je završni polish fokusiran na preglednost: scena ostaje čista, a status režima, dominantni učinak i profil brzine čitaju se odmah ispod canvasa istim ritmom kao i ostatak vježbe.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="rw-chip">v -> Re -> režim</div>
        </div>

        <div class="rw-note"><strong>Kako čitati režim:</strong> Ovdje je modelirana voda u maloj cijevi promjera <strong>2 mm</strong>, pa pomicanjem brzine možeš stvarno proći kroz sve tri zone. Lijevo vidiš kako se uređene strujnice pretvaraju u valovit i vrtložan tok, a desno kako se profil brzine iz paraboličnog spljoštava u turbulentni „čepasti" profil.</div>

        <div class="rw-stage">
            <div class="rw-scene">
                <canvas id="flow-canvas" width="920" height="340"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="rw-summary">
                <div id="re-status">Re = 1000 (Laminarno)</div>
                <div class="rw-metrics">
                    <div class="rw-metric"><small>Dominira</small><strong id="re-dominant">viskoznost</strong></div>
                    <div class="rw-metric"><small>Pragovi</small><strong id="re-thresholds">2300 / 4000</strong></div>
                    <div class="rw-metric"><small>Profil</small><strong id="re-profile">parabola</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="rw-lower">
            <div class="rw-controls">
                <label>Brzina strujanja v: <span id="v-re-val" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="v-re-slider" min="0.05" max="5" step="0.05" value="0.5">
                <div class="rw-model">Model: voda, ν = 1.0×10⁻⁶ m²/s, d = 2 mm.</div>
            </div>

            <div class="rw-explainer"><strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="re-explainer"></span></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const vS = document.getElementById('v-re-slider');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('flow-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const status = document.getElementById('re-status');
    const lanes = [-0.86, -0.7, -0.54, -0.38, -0.22, -0.06, 0.06, 0.22, 0.38, 0.54, 0.7, 0.86];
    const particles = [];
    const state = { v: 0.5, re: 1000, regime: 'Laminarno', dominant: 'viskoznost', profile: 'parabola', color: '#22c55e', mix: 0, time: 0 };
    const d = 0.002;
    const nu = 1e-6;

    lanes.forEach((lane, laneIndex) => {
        for (let index = 0; index < 8; index++) {
            particles.push({ lane, phase: (index / 8 + laneIndex * 0.025) % 1, bias: 0.85 + Math.random() * 0.3 });
        }
    });

    function classify(re) {
        if (re < 2300) return { regime: 'Laminarno', dominant: 'viskoznost', profile: 'parabola', color: '#22c55e', mix: 0 };
        if (re < 4000) return { regime: 'Prijelazno', dominant: 'oba učinka', profile: 'spljošten', color: '#f59e0b', mix: (re - 2300) / 1700 };
        return { regime: 'Turbulentno', dominant: 'inercija', profile: 'čepast', color: '#ef4444', mix: 1 };
    }

    function laneSpeed(lane) {
        const r = Math.abs(lane);
        const laminar = 1.8 * (1 - r * r);
        const turbulent = 1.15 + 0.55 * (1 - Math.pow(r, 8));
        return (1 - state.mix) * laminar + state.mix * turbulent;
    }

    function update() {
        const v = parseFloat(vS.value);
        const re = v * d / nu;
        const cls = classify(re);

        state.v = v;
        state.re = re;
        Object.assign(state, cls);

        document.getElementById('v-re-val').textContent = v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('re-dominant').textContent = cls.dominant;
        document.getElementById('re-profile').textContent = cls.profile;
        document.getElementById('re-explainer').textContent = `Za brzinu ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s dobivaš Re ≈ ${re.toFixed(0)}. Zato je režim ${cls.regime.toLowerCase()}, dominira ${cls.dominant}, a profil brzine prelazi prema obliku: ${cls.profile}. Pragovi 2300 i 4000 označavaju kada uredni slojevi više ne mogu ostati stabilni.`;

        status.textContent = `Re = ${re.toFixed(0)} (${cls.regime})`;
        if (cls.regime === 'Laminarno') {
            status.style.background = '#dcfce7';
            status.style.borderColor = '#bbf7d0';
            status.style.color = '#166534';
        } else if (cls.regime === 'Prijelazno') {
            status.style.background = '#fef3c7';
            status.style.borderColor = '#fde68a';
            status.style.color = '#92400e';
        } else {
            status.style.background = '#fee2e2';
            status.style.borderColor = '#fecaca';
            status.style.color = '#991b1b';
        }
    }

    function streamlineY(x, lane, pipe) {
        const amp = state.regime === 'Laminarno' ? 0 : (state.regime === 'Prijelazno' ? 5 : 12);
        const ramp = Math.max(0, (x - pipe.x) / pipe.w);
        const wiggle = amp * ramp * (0.25 + Math.abs(lane)) * Math.sin(x * 0.03 + state.time * 0.05 + lane * 5.5);
        return pipe.cy + lane * (pipe.h / 2 - 12) + wiggle;
    }

    function draw() {
        state.time += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const pipe = { x: 42, y: 72, w: 520, h: 196, cy: 170 };
        const profile = { x: 620, y: 58, w: 230, h: 224 };

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0b1220';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, pipe.y, 0, pipe.y + pipe.h);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, 'rgba(96,165,250,0.28)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(37,99,235,0.18)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(pipe.x, pipe.y, pipe.w, pipe.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(pipe.x, pipe.y, pipe.w, pipe.h);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        ctx.font = '700 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('strujnice u cijevi', pipe.x, 34);
        ctx.fillText('profil brzine', profile.x, 34);

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.35)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.3;
        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            ctx.beginPath();
            for (let x = pipe.x + 8; x <= pipe.x + pipe.w - 8; x += 12) {
                const y = streamlineY(x, lane, pipe);
                if (x === pipe.x + 8) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        particles.forEach((particle) => {
            particle.phase = (particle.phase + 0.0015 * state.v * laneSpeed(particle.lane) * particle.bias) % 1;
            const x = pipe.x + particle.phase * pipe.w;
            const y = streamlineY(x, particle.lane, pipe);
            ctx.fillStyle = state.color;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        if (state.regime === 'Turbulentno') {
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(248,113,113,0.75)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.7;
            [pipe.x + 390, pipe.x + 450].forEach((cx, index) => {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(cx, pipe.cy + (index === 0 ? -42 : 44), 18, 0, Math.PI * 1.8);
                ctx.stroke();
            });
        }

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(profile.x, profile.y, profile.w, profile.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.5)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(profile.x + 44, profile.y + 12);
        ctx.lineTo(profile.x + 44, profile.y + profile.h - 12);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.font = '11px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('brzina', profile.x + 86, profile.y + profile.h - 12);

        ctx.strokeStyle = state.color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        let first = true;
        for (let yIndex = 0; yIndex <= 40; yIndex += 1) {
            const lane = -1 + (yIndex / 40) * 2;
            const y = profile.y + 16 + (yIndex / 40) * (profile.h - 32);
            const x = profile.x + 44 + (laneSpeed(lane) / 1.8) * 140;
            if (first) {
                ctx.moveTo(x, y);
                first = false;
            } else {
                ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            }
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        lanes.forEach((lane) => {
            const y = profile.y + 16 + ((lane + 1) / 2) * (profile.h - 32);
            const x = profile.x + 44 + (laneSpeed(lane) / 1.8) * 140;
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148,163,184,0.18)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(profile.x + 44, y);
            ctx.lineTo(x, y);
            ctx.stroke();
        });

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    vS.oninput = update;
    update();
    draw();
})();
</script>

```
